description_long: This object is a rectangular, monumental building with a dark, stone-like exterior and a flat, overhanging roof. The facade features a series of evenly spaced vertical columns or pilasters, giving it a strong, fortified appearance reminiscent of classical bank architecture. The roof is slightly pitched and extends beyond the main structure, creating a pronounced shadow line. The sides and rear of the building mirror the front, with the same columnar detailing and solid, windowless walls. The overall form is symmetrical and imposing, suggesting a secure and authoritative institution. There are no visible windows, doors, or decorative signage, emphasizing a sense of solidity and permanence.
description: A dark, rectangular bank building with a flat, overhanging roof and strong vertical columns along all sides, evoking a classical, fortified style. The structure is solid, symmetrical, and windowless, emphasizing security and permanence.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full width of the building with prominent vertical columns and a flat, overhanging roof.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the pitched roof and the depth of the building, with the same columnar detailing along the side.
description_view_2: The rear view is nearly identical to the front, with the same arrangement of columns and roof overhang.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the pitched roof and column details.
attribute_entrance_design: No visible entrance; the facade is solid with no discernible doors or entry points.
